channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: 1 Warren Mews, 27th April
item.description:
The road drain directly outside our office at 1 Warren Mews appears to be blocked and is giving off strong, unpleasant odours. The smell becomes noticeably worse whenever the weather turns warm, and it is now coming into the studio and affecting our working environment. We suspect the blockage may also be causing wastewater to back up through the internal pipes of the building. As a business ratepayer in the borough, we would be grateful if the gully crew could attend to inspect and clear the drain as a priority.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 32, Warren Street, Fitzrovia, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins full up again and rubbish left alongside again, 27th April
item.description:
Bigger/more bins needed!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ash Row, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 27th April

item.title: Grey Polo dumped in carpark, 27th April
item.description:
Hi, There is a grey VW Polo that has been dumped in Pickering Close carpark. It hasn’t moved in months and has a flat tyre. I shared photos with the other owners and no one confirmed it to be theirs. I have also checked and the car has no MOT or Tax.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pickering Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken Litter Bin, 27th April
item.description:
There are 2 litter bins in the communal garden/playground. One is fine. The other has a plastic liner bin that is broken. Litter falls through the broken bottom onto the ground causing a mess. Needs repairing or replacing
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grosvenor Terrace, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Resident painted bexley lamp post, 27th April
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grove Road, Barnehurst, Greater London

item.title: Fly Tipping, 27th April
item.description:
Mixed fly tipping outside Communal Garden’s / Playground. Shelves, metal pieces, sack containing miscellaneous items

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grosvenor Terrace, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Public tree too big, over powering, constantly wilting and dropping greenery and twigs., 27th April
item.description:
Dear Bromley, I would like to enquire about the tree outside my property and ask if you can consider taking it down? This tree is extremely large, it leans to one side, and it constantly drops things throughout the year, including large twigs. Maintaining the front access, and neighbouring properties, is very hard work. It is a much larger than average tree, it drops small acorns, leaves, twigs, and caterpillar shaped greenery separately throughout the year. The roots are also heavily embedded under various properties. The tree is very scary, and very overpowering. I speak on behalf of many residents near the tree who are all wishing for its safe removal. Please can you give this consideration? Kind regards, John Craig 33 Woldham road BR2 9LA. 07595 959193

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woldham Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked gully grate in Jasper Passage, 27th April
item.description:
